name: Matt Murphy: The case of the stone guest
developer: David Ponce Segura, Luis Ponce Segura
short_description: In this pixelated adventure from Sock Films, you'll have to help Matt Murphy and his faithful friend Trey to catch, look, talk and search the underworld of Naperville.
detailed_description: Immerse yourself in 'Matt Murphy: The Case of the Stone Guest', a retro-style point-and-click graphic adventure. Join Detective Matt Murphy, a down-on-his-luck ex-cop, as he unravels the mystery of a dog's disappearance across 12 locations in the decaying city of Naperville. Working alongside your partner Trey, you will have to pick up, use, look and search the city's underbelly to discover its secrets.
